C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS READ INTO THE COURT RECORD. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. STEPHEN WONG APPEARED WITH PLAINTIFFS. GREGOR GUY-SMITH APPEARED WITH DEFENDANT BIANCA LUCRECIA. VISITING JUDGE, RICHARD W. KESSELL. REPORTER, LORETTA NAJARA. D. CARTER, CLERK. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCRECIA, BIANCA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2106 UNION STREET 3RD FLOOR SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94123 $8,650.00 RENT, $1,082.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,732.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COST PER COST BILL ALSO PART OF JUDGMENT TERMS.
